name: SKF 6204-2RS1 Deep Groove Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 20mm | OD: 47mm | Width: 14mm | Dynamic Load: 12.7kN | Seal: 2RS
description: The most versatile bearing in industrial applications. Supports combined radial and axial loads with rubber seals on both sides for contamination protection.

name: SKF 6308 Deep Groove Ball Bearing (Open)
specs: Bore: 40mm | OD: 90mm | Width: 23mm | Dynamic Load: 42kN | Open Design
description: Open-design deep groove bearing for high-speed electric motors. Grease-lubricated with precision ground raceways for minimal runout.

name: SKF 7210 BECBP Angular Contact Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 50mm | Contact Angle: 40° | Dynamic Load: 46.2kN | Precision: P6
description: Designed for high-speed spindle applications with combined radial and axial load capability. Features a contact angle of 40° for maximum axial stiffness.

name: SKF 2210 E-2RS1KTN9 Self-Aligning Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 50mm | OD: 90mm | Inner Ring Tilt: ±2.5° | Dynamic Load: 28.7kN
description: Double row self-aligning ball bearing that accommodates misalignment of the shaft relative to the housing. Ideal for long shaft applications.

name: SKF 51206 Thrust Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 30mm | OD: 52mm | Height: 16mm | Axial Load: 28kN
description: Single direction thrust ball bearing for pure axial loads. Flat race design ensures uniform load distribution under compressive axial forces.

name: SKF NJ 214 ECP Cylindrical Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 70mm | OD: 125mm | Width: 24mm | Dynamic Load: 134kN
description: Single row cylindrical roller bearing with NJ design for combined radial and one-directional axial load capacity. High-speed gearbox rated.

name: SKF NK 35/20 Needle Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 35mm | OD: 45mm | Width: 20mm | Dynamic Load: 41kN | No Inner Ring
description: Compact needle roller bearing without inner ring, providing high load capacity in constrained radial space. Common in gearbox and engine applications.

name: SKF 30208 J2 Tapered Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 40mm | OD: 80mm | Contact Angle: 16° | Dynamic Load: 66.3kN
description: Single row tapered roller bearing for simultaneous radial and axial loads. Standard industry choice for automotive wheel hubs and differential applications.

name: SKF 22216 E Spherical Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 80mm | OD: 140mm | Width: 33mm | Dynamic Load: 186kN | Self-aligning
description: Double row spherical roller bearing with high misalignment tolerance. Engineered for heavy radial and impact loads in mining, paper mills, and heavy industry.

name: SKF SY 40 TF Pillow Block Unit
specs: Shaft: 40mm | Housing: Cast Iron | Grease Nipple | Re-lubricatable
description: Ready-to-mount pillow block bearing unit with a self-aligning ball bearing insert. Provides flexible shaft support in conveyor and fan installations.

name: SKF YAR 205-2F Insert Bearing
specs: Bore: 25mm | OD: 52mm | Set Screw Locking | Compatible: Standard Housings
description: Y-bearing (insert bearing) designed to snap into standard SKF housings. Self-aligning with set screw locking for simple mounting to shafts.

name: SKF C 2215 CARB Toroidal Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 75mm | OD: 130mm | Freely displaceable axially | Self-aligning
description: Revolutionary CARB toroidal roller bearing combining the misalignment tolerance of a spherical roller bearing with the free axial displacement of a cylindrical bearing.

name: SKF 6312/C3 INSOCOAT Electrically Insulated Bearing
specs: Bore: 60mm | OD: 130mm | Insulation Voltage: >1000V DC | C3 Clearance
description: INSOCOAT bearing with aluminium oxide coating preventing stray electric current damage. Essential in VFD-driven motors and rail traction applications.

name: SKF GE 40 ES-2RS Spherical Plain Bearing
specs: Bore: 40mm | OD: 68mm | Contact Angle: 10° | PTFE Sliding Layer | 2RS Seal
description: Maintenance-free spherical plain bearing with PTFE sliding layer for low-friction tilting and swivelling motion. Used in hydraulic cylinders and linkages.

name: SKF 618/8 Thin Section Deep Groove Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 8mm | OD: 16mm | Width: 4mm | Ultra-compact | High-speed rated
description: Ultra-compact thin section ball bearing for miniature and precision instruments where space and weight are critical design constraints.

name: FAG 6204-C-2Z Deep Groove Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 20mm | OD: 47mm | Width: 14mm | Seal: ZZ Metal Shield | Dynamic Load: 12.7kN
description: FAG deep groove ball bearing with metal shields on both sides. Standard workhorse for electric motors, pumps, and household appliances. Produced at Schaeffler's Savli, Vadodara plant.

name: FAG 6315-M Deep Groove Ball Bearing (Large)
specs: Bore: 75mm | OD: 160mm | Width: 37mm | Dynamic Load: 113kN | Brass Cage
description: Large bore deep groove ball bearing with brass cage for elevated operating temperatures. Suitable for large traction motors and industrial machinery.

name: FAG 7208-B-XL-TVP Angular Contact Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 40mm | Contact Angle: 40° | Dynamic Load: 36.5kN | Polyamide Cage
description: Single row angular contact ball bearing for combined load applications at high speeds. Matched pairs available for back-to-back or face-to-face mounting.

name: FAG HSS7010-C-T-P4S Precision Spindle Bearing
specs: Bore: 50mm | Precision: P4 | Contact Angle: 15° | Optimised for CNC spindles
description: Super-precision angular contact spindle bearing for CNC machining centres. Tolerances ground to P4 level for micron-level accuracy at 12,000+ rpm.

name: FAG 3308-BD-2HRS-TVH Double Row Angular Contact
specs: Bore: 40mm | OD: 90mm | Two-row | Dynamic Load: 89.5kN | 2HRS Seal
description: Double row angular contact ball bearing for high stiffness applications requiring combined loads in both axial directions simultaneously.

name: FAG 51107 Thrust Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 35mm | OD: 52mm | Height: 12mm | Axial Load: 23.6kN | Single Direction
description: Precision-ground thrust ball bearing for single direction axial loads. Precision steel plates provide smooth, low-friction axial movement in presses and gearboxes.

name: FAG NU 1020-M1 Cylindrical Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 100mm | OD: 150mm | Width: 24mm | Dynamic Load: 177kN | Brass Cage
description: Single row cylindrical roller bearing with brass cage (M1) for high-speed operation in machine tool spindles and traction motors.

name: FAG 32010-X Tapered Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 50mm | OD: 80mm | Contact Angle: 12° | Dynamic Load: 64kN
description: Single row tapered roller bearing suitable for automotive wheel hubs, transmissions, and gearboxes with combined radial and axial loading.

name: FAG 22212-E1-K Spherical Roller Bearing (Tapered Bore)
specs: Bore: 60mm (1:12 taper) | OD: 110mm | Dynamic Load: 138kN | Adapter Sleeve Mount
description: Spherical roller bearing with tapered bore for adapter sleeve mounting. Simplifies field installation on smooth shafts without machining.

name: FAG SNL 215 Plummer Block Housing
specs: Shaft: 75mm | Material: Grey Cast Iron | Split Design | For 215 Series Bearings
description: Heavy-duty split plummer block housing accepting FAG 215-series spherical roller bearings. Bolt-on split lid for easy bearing replacement without dismounting shaft.

name: INA NKI 30/20 Needle Roller Bearing with Inner Ring
specs: Bore: 30mm | OD: 45mm | Width: 20mm | Dynamic Load: 39.5kN | With Inner Ring
description: Needle roller bearing with machined inner ring for applications where the shaft surface cannot be used as a raceway. High load density per volume.

name: INA CSXU050-2RS-HLE Four Point Contact Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 127mm (5") | OD: 146.05mm | Width: 12.7mm | Weight: 0.29kg | 2RS Brass Cage
description: Thin section four point contact ball bearing for high axial load capacity in a minimum radial cross section. Used in robotic joints, medical equipment and aerospace.

name: FAG 1210-K-TVH-C3 Self-Aligning Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 50mm | OD: 90mm | C3 Clearance | Self-aligning | Double Row
description: Double row self-aligning ball bearing with tapered bore for adapter sleeve mounting. Accommodates angular misalignment of up to 2° in heavy vibrating machinery.

name: NBC 6204 Deep Groove Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 20mm | OD: 47mm | Width: 14mm | Dynamic Load: 12.7kN | IS/ISO Certified
description: Indian-manufactured deep groove ball bearing conforming to IS/ISO standards. Manufactured at NBC's Jaipur plant. Preferred for domestic industrial OEM procurement.

name: NBC 6310/C3 Deep Groove Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 50mm | OD: 110mm | C3 Clearance | Dynamic Load: 61.8kN | Open
description: Medium-bore deep groove ball bearing with C3 internal clearance for elevated operating temperatures. Widely used in agricultural equipment and pumps across India.

name: NBC NU 210 EC Cylindrical Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 50mm | OD: 90mm | Width: 20mm | Dynamic Load: 76.5kN | Steel Cage
description: NBC cylindrical roller bearing for high radial load applications. Available in NU, NJ, and NF designs suitable for rail, traction, and industrial gearbox use.

name: NBC 32206 Tapered Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 30mm | OD: 62mm | Contact Angle: 14° | Dynamic Load: 47.3kN
description: NBC tapered roller bearing for combined radial and axial loads. Competitive alternative to imported brands for heavy-vehicle front axle and hub applications in India.

name: NBC 2209 E Self-Aligning Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 45mm | OD: 85mm | Width: 23mm | Misalignment: ±2° | Double Row
description: Self-aligning double row ball bearing for shafts susceptible to deflection. Ideal for Indian industrial fans, blowers, and textile machinery.

name: NBC SY 30 TF Pillow Block Unit
specs: Shaft: 30mm | Cast Iron Housing | Insert Bearing | Set Screw Lock
description: Economical pillow block bearing unit with NBC insert bearing. Suitable for agricultural conveyor belts and material handling equipment across Indian factories.

name: Timken 32208 Tapered Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 40mm | OD: 80mm | Contact Angle: 14.25° | Dynamic Load: 80.3kN
description: Classic Timken tapered roller bearing set (cone and cup). Industry standard for automotive drivetrains, trucks, and off-highway equipment axle applications.

name: Timken 3982/3920 Imperial Tapered Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 57.15mm (2.25") | OD: 95.25mm (3.75") | Inch Series | Dynamic Load: 107kN
description: Timken inch-series tapered roller bearing (cone + cup assembly). Used extensively in North American style heavy equipment and classic vehicle restorations.

name: Timken 22215CJ Spherical Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 75mm | OD: 130mm | Width: 31mm | Dynamic Load: 176kN | E Design
description: Timken spherical roller bearing with optimized internal geometry for extended fatigue life. Designed for mining crushers, vibrating screens, and paper machinery.

name: Timken NNU4932 Cylindrical Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 160mm | OD: 220mm | Width: 60mm | Double Row | Dynamic Load: 630kN
description: Timken double row cylindrical roller bearing (TDO) for machine tool spindles requiring extreme radial stiffness and high load capacity.

name: Timken W208PPB6 Agricultural Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 1.0" Round Bore | Triple Lip Seal | Eccentric Locking Collar | Agricultural Grade
description: Heavy-duty agricultural ball bearing with triple lip seal for superior protection against mud, water, and debris in farm field equipment.

name: NTN 6206LLU Deep Groove Ball Bearing
specs: Bore: 30mm | OD: 62mm | Width: 16mm | Seal: LLU Non-contact | Dynamic Load: 19.5kN
description: Japanese NTN deep groove ball bearing with non-contact rubber seal. Ultra-low torque for high-speed applications including electric motors and computer peripherals.

name: NTN 7210CDB Angular Contact Ball Bearing (Pair)
specs: Bore: 50mm | DB Matched Pair | Contact Angle: 15° | Dynamic Load: 50kN per row
description: Back-to-back matched pair of NTN angular contact ball bearings. Provides bidirectional axial stiffness for precision machine tool spindles and pump shafts.

name: NTN 32210 Tapered Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 50mm | OD: 90mm | Width: 24.75mm | Dynamic Load: 90kN | Metric Series
description: NTN high-capacity tapered roller bearing with a large contact angle for heavy axial thrust capability. Popular in industrial gearboxes and wheel bearings.

name: NTN UCF 210 Flanged Bearing Unit
specs: Shaft: 50mm | 4-Bolt Flange | Cast Iron | Self-aligning Insert | Grease Packed
description: NTN four-bolt flanged bearing unit for side- or end-mounting on machinery frames. Pre-lubricated and maintenance-friendly for conveyor and fan installations.

name: NTN NK47/20 Needle Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 47mm | OD: 57mm | Width: 20mm | No Inner Ring | Dynamic Load: 57.5kN
description: NTN needle roller bearing without inner ring for extremely compact cross-section. Provides high load density in engine connecting rods and two-stroke crankshafts.

name: NTN 22210EAD1 Spherical Roller Bearing
specs: Bore: 50mm | OD: 90mm | Width: 23mm | Dynamic Load: 85.5kN | EAD Cage
description: NTN spherical roller bearing with advanced EAD nylon cage for reduced weight and operating noise. Used in quarrying, construction, and cement plant applications.

name: NTN GE 50 ES Spherical Plain Bearing
specs: Bore: 50mm | OD: 75mm | Maintenance-free PTFE Liner | Contact Angle: 8°
description: NTN maintenance-free spherical plain bearing for oscillating motion in agricultural linkages, steering systems, and industrial robotic joints.

name: SKF 6024-M Deep Groove Ball Bearing – 120mm Bore, Brass Cage, Open
specs: Bore 120mm | OD 180mm | Width 28mm | Brass cage | Open design
description: Large-bore SKF deep groove ball bearing with brass cage for operation at elevated temperatures. Precision-ground raceways ensure low noise and minimal runout. Suitable for large AC/DC traction motors and industrial compressors.

name: SKF 353101 Hub Bearing Unit – Pre-set Flanged, Truck/LCV Front Wheel
specs: Pre-set | Flanged | For truck and LCV front wheel hub
description: Pre-set flanged hub bearing unit for truck and LCV front wheel hubs. Integrated flanged design reduces component count and speeds installation. Tapered roller technology handles combined radial and heavy axial loads.

name: SKF LQCF 20 Linear Guidance Carriage – 20mm Rail, 4-Direction Load
specs: Rail width 20mm | 4-direction load | Standard & flanged carriage versions
description: Compact SKF profiled rail linear guidance system with 20mm rail. Smooth, accurate four-directional load-carrying for automation, CNC, and robotics. Low-friction recirculating ball circuit.

name: FAG 6316-M-C3 Deep Groove Ball Bearing – 80mm Bore, Brass Cage, C3
specs: Bore 80mm | OD 170mm | Width 39mm | Brass cage | C3 clearance
description: Extra-large FAG deep groove ball bearing with brass cage and C3 internal clearance. C3 clearance compensates for thermal shaft expansion. Designed for large electric motors and heavy-duty industrial drives.

name: FAG 22326-E1-K Spherical Roller Bearing – 130mm Tapered Bore, 570kN
specs: Bore 130mm (1:12 taper) | OD 280mm | Dynamic Load 570kN | E1 design
description: Large-bore FAG spherical roller bearing with tapered bore for adapter sleeve mounting. E1 optimised internal geometry for higher load capacity and lower heat generation. For mining conveyors and large gearboxes.

name: FAG HEATER50-BASIC-230V Induction Bearing Heater – Up to 50kg
specs: Max 50kg | 230V single-phase | Auto-demagnetisation after cycle
description: Compact FAG induction heating device for safe bearing mounting on components up to 50kg. Eliminates bearing damage from hammer or press force. Essential for industrial maintenance workshops.

name: NBC 6305-ZZ Deep Groove Ball Bearing – 25mm Bore, Made in India
specs: Bore 25mm | OD 62mm | Width 17mm | ZZ metal shields | Made in India
description: NBC deep groove ball bearing with ZZ double metal shields. Manufactured at NEI's Jaipur plant. ZZ shields protect against dust and contamination. Suitable for electric motors and pumps.

name: NBC 30205 Tapered Roller Bearing – 25mm Bore, Automotive/2-Wheeler
specs: Bore 25mm | OD 52mm | Width 16.25mm | For 2-wheelers and light vehicles
description: NBC single-row tapered roller bearing for automotive and 2-wheeler OEM. Handles combined radial and axial loads. Standard fitment in motorcycle wheel hubs and scooter gearboxes.

name: NTN 6206-LLU Deep Groove Ball Bearing – 30mm Bore, 2RS Rubber Sealed
specs: Bore 30mm | OD 62mm | Width 16mm | LLU (2RS) rubber seals | Pre-greased
description: NTN deep groove ball bearing with LLU contact rubber seals on both sides. Pre-greased and sealed for maintenance-free operation. Superior contamination protection for electric motors and pumps.

name: NTN 4T-32007 Tapered Roller Bearing – 35mm Bore, Enhanced Heat Treatment
specs: Bore 35mm | OD 62mm | Width 18mm | 4T heat treatment | Metric series
description: NTN metric-series tapered roller bearing with 4T enhanced heat treatment for improved fatigue life. Suitable for automotive transmissions and industrial gearboxes.

name: NTN UCP 207 Pillow Block Bearing Unit – 35mm Shaft, Cast Iron
specs: Shaft 35mm | UC207 insert | P207 cast iron housing | Set screw | 2-bolt
description: NTN complete pillow block unit with UC207 self-aligning insert in P207 cast iron housing. Bore 35mm. 2-bolt mounting for conveyors and fan installations.

name: Timken LM11749/LM11710 Tapered Roller Bearing – 3/4" Bore, Inch Series
specs: Bore 19.05mm (3/4") | OD 45.24mm | Width 15.49mm | Inch series
description: Timken imperial inch-series tapered roller bearing. Bore 3/4 inch. Used in agricultural equipment wheel hubs and small gearboxes. Timken is the global leader in inch-series bearings.

name: Arcanol MULTITOP – Universal High-Performance Bearing Grease
specs: Temp: -40°C to +140°C | Speed Factor: 800,000 | Soap Base: Lithium Complex
description: Universal high-performance grease for ball and roller bearings. Provides excellent corrosion protection and water resistance. The standard choice for electric motors and industrial machinery.

name: Arcanol LOAD150 – Heavy-Duty Grease for High Loads
specs: Viscosity: 150 cSt | Thickener: Lithium/Calcium | EP Additives: Yes
description: Specialized grease for bearings under high pressure and heavy impact loads. Ideal for mining equipment, construction machinery, and heavy industrial gearboxes.

name: Arcanol HYPERFORM 46 – Premium Industrial Hydraulic Oil
specs: ISO VG 46 | Anti-wear (AW) | Thermal Stability: High
description: High-purity hydraulic oil designed for precision industrial systems. Reduces pump wear and prevents sludge formation in high-pressure hydraulic circuits.

name: Arcanol GEARGUARD 320 – Extreme Pressure Gear Oil
specs: ISO VG 320 | EP Performance | Micropitting Resistance
description: Advanced gear oil for heavily loaded industrial gear units. Protects against micropitting and ensures long service life for high-torque transmissions.

name: ARCALUB C1 – Automatic Single-Point Lubricator
specs: Volume: 125cm³ | Pressure: 5 bar | Period: 1-12 months (Adjustable)
description: Automatic lubricator for reliable, continuous grease supply to single bearing points. Ensures precise lubrication and reduces maintenance costs.

name: FAG HEATER150 – Induction Heater for Large Bearings
specs: Max Weight: 150kg | 400V 3-Phase | Temperature Control: Up to 240°C
description: Powerful induction heating device for mounting large bearings. Safe, uniform heating prevents localized overheating and extends bearing fatigue life.

name: FAG Fitting Tool Set – Mechanical Mounting Kit
specs: Bore Range: 10-50mm | Impact Rings: 33 | Dead-blow Hammer included
description: Comprehensive tool set for the mechanical mounting of smaller bearings. Prevents damage to raceways and rolling elements during cold mounting.

name: FAG LASER-SMARTY2 – Laser Shaft Alignment Tool
specs: Precision: 0.01mm | Distance: Up to 10m | Bluetooth Connectivity
description: Precision laser alignment tool for rotating shafts. Reduces vibration and energy consumption by ensuring perfect alignment between motors and driven units.

name: Schaeffler SmartCheck – Condition Monitoring System
specs: Sensors: Vibration, Temp | Memory: 4GB | Protection: IP67
description: Compact, online condition monitoring system. Provides early warning of bearing damage and machine faults via vibration and temperature analysis.

name: FAG SNS Series Plummer Block Housing
specs: Material: Spheroidal Graphite Cast Iron | Lubrication: Grease or Oil
description: High-performance split plummer block housing. Patented design increases bearing life by up to 50% through optimized load distribution.

name: INA KUVE Profiled Rail Linear Guidance System
specs: Accuracy: Precision class G1 | Sealing: Integral | High stiffness
description: Four-row recirculating linear ball bearing and guideway assembly. Provides high precision and stiffness for CNC machines and automation systems.

name: FAG Super Precision Spindle Bearing (HSS70 Series)
specs: Precision: P4S | Contact Angle: 15° | Ceramic Ball Options available
description: Ultra-high precision angular contact ball bearing for machine tool spindles. Engineered for maximum speed and accuracy in high-end CNC applications.
